title: MechMonstrosity
description: This mod adds a mechanical behemoth based on redstone monstrosity
body:
## 描述
这个mod添加了一只以红石巨兽为原型的机械巨兽，这只庞大的机械造物会使用巨炮与飞弹给予敌人沉重的打击。（看样子它很不开心）
## 注意！
这个mod需要Geckolib才能运行。
## description
This mod adds a mechanical behemoth based on redstone monstrosity, a massive mechanical creature that uses a cannon and missiles to deal heavy blows to enemies.
## Attention!
This mod requires Geckolib to work.
